title: lamium striatum subsp. nivale
intro: Lamium striatum subsp. nivale, also known as snow lamium, is a subspecies of the Lamiaceae family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of snow lamium include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate gastrointestinal problems. Snow lamium can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to create a soothing and healing remedy.
